FAQ

Order information

How do I order?

Add products to cart, checkout, enter delivery details, pay using UPI and generate your order ID. Then send the order details on WhatsApp or email.

What products are available?

LOONDRY currently has black meme-based t-shirts and white coffee mugs with funny prints. T-shirts are ₹499 and mugs are ₹399.

Is the price final?

The cart shows subtotal, GST and final payable amount before payment, so there are no surprise calculations at checkout.

Can I request my own meme?

Yes. Send your idea through the request section. If the meme is funny enough and wearable enough, it may enter the next LOONDRY drop.

Refund policy?

Everything is procured before dispatch, so orders are treated as final after payment confirmation.

LOONDRY drops memewear for people who dress clean but think unhinged.
